user.title: ACIT ThermACEC Setup
user.description: Configure your ACIT ThermACEC board. Make sure your MQTT broker is accessible.

data_description.name: Custom name for your device
data_description.host: IP address or hostname of MQTT broker (e.g., 10.0.0.213)
data_description.topic_prefix: Prefix used for MQTT topics (e.g., acit/thermacec)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to MQTT broker

init.title: ACIT ThermaControl Options
init.description: Modify settings for your ACIT ThermaControl integration.
